title: Rotation Period of a White Dwarf
body: The Sun's mass is $$2\times{10}^{30}$$ kg, its radius is $$7\times{10}^5$$ km, and it has a rotational period of approximately $$28$$ days. It collapses into a white dwarf of radius $$3.5\times{10}^3$$ km, no mass is ejected, and a sphere of uniform density (I=(2/5)*M*R**2) can model the Sun both before and after.
